name: video-caption-generator

# Video Caption Generator (adapter)

Source skill: [`video-caption-generator/`](../../../video-caption-generator/) — see
[`video-caption-generator/SKILL.md`](../../../video-caption-generator/SKILL.md).

## When to use

- Standalone captioning for any clip
- Pairs with [`short-form-pipeline`](../short-form-pipeline/SKILL.md) and
